scripts.build:wasm: cmake -E make_directory packages/lexiform-js/dist && cd build && ..\emsdk\upstream\emscripten\emcmake.bat cmake .. && cmake --build . && cmake -E copy_if_different lexiform.js ../packages/lexiform-js/dist/ && cmake -E copy_if_different lexiform.wasm ../packages/lexiform-js/dist/
scripts.build:js: npm run build -w packages/lexiform-js && cmake -E copy_if_different packages/lexiform-js/client.d.ts packages/lexiform-js/dist/ && cmake -E copy_if_different build/lexiform.js packages/lexiform-js/dist/ && cmake -E copy_if_different build/lexiform.wasm packages/lexiform-js/dist/ && cmake -E copy_if_different build/lexiform.js packages/lexiform-js/src/core/ && cmake -E copy_if_different build/lexiform.wasm packages/lexiform-js/src/core/
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:js && npm run build:frontend
